source: The quarter lies in front of a door that opens onto a cracking blacktop road . There is honeysuckle in the air , and the smells of oil and aftershave hitching a ride on evaporating sweat . An ancient car sits at the side of the road , black and dusty , one of its rear tires flat . Standing next to the hood , a young man with blisters on his face and bloody fluid leaking from behind his sunglasses is preaching .
domestication: 这块地方就在一扇门的前面，门开向一条路面已经开裂的柏油路。空气中弥漫着茉莉花的香气，还有机油和须后水的味道，像是在蒸发的汗水上搭了便车。一辆古董车停在路边，漆黑而尘土飞扬，其中一个后轮瘪了。一个年轻人站在引擎盖旁，他脸上起了水泡，从墨镜后面渗出血液，他正对着人群布道。
foreignization: 这片区域位于一扇门的前方，这扇门开向一条正在裂开的黑色沥青路。空气中弥漫着木槿的香气，以及油和须后水的气味，这些气味伴随着蒸发的汗水飘散。一辆古老的汽车停在路边，漆面黑色且满是灰尘，其中一个后轮已经瘪了。在引擎盖旁边，一个脸上有水泡、墨镜后面渗出血液的年轻人正在布道。

source: And the ones he thought were lobsters were only shrimps . Pretty new ones at that . Not much meat here . He 'd have to work hard to make it worth the trip . Now that he had the scale of things , he scanned the surface , looking for anything with any size at all . The lobsters lay there mostly inert as he clambered over them to reach the nearest pup .
domestication: 他本以为捞到龙虾了，结果却只是一些小虾，还是新鲜的那种。这里的肉不多，他得好好干活才能收获满意的成果。现在他已经摸清了情况，就开始扫视海面，寻找任何稍微有点规模的东西。那些龙虾大多数都很静止地躺着，他爬过它们，去找最近的小崽。
foreignization: 而他以为是龙虾的其实只是几只小虾，只不过新鲜而已，肉也没有多少。他必须努力工作才能让这次旅行物有所值。现在他已经知道了事物的规模，他扫视着表面，寻找任何有一定大小的东西。龙虾大多数静止不动地躺在那里，当他爬过它们去到最近的一只幼崽旁边。

source: Then I showed Vi how to click on flags , populations , alliances . I took her right up to now , 2007 , Montenegro out on its own again , Kosovo possibly soon . " So this is what you do , Chris , " said Vi still puzzling , " all the random stuff you must know ! " Of course she knows random stuff too , but she does n't know it 's random yet . To someone of my age it 's all an unsettling patchwork . Patterns I once perceived have gone blurry . There are too many patches , too many stitches . It will only get worse .
domestication: 我接着教维如何点击旗帜、人口和联盟这些选项。我带她了解了从过去到现在的变化，直到2007年，黑山再次独立，科索沃可能也会很快独立。“原来你就是做这种事情啊，克里斯，”维仍然很困惑地说，“你脑子里竟然有这么多杂七杂八的东西！”当然，维自己也知道很多东西，但她还没意识到这些东西是杂乱无章的。对于像我这个年龄的人来说，世界就像一块不太协调的拼缝被子。曾经清晰的图案变得模糊不清。被子上有太多的碎片，太多的针脚。而且，这种情况只会越来越糟糕。
foreignization: 然后我向维展示了如何点击国旗、人口和联盟。我带她了解到现在，2007年，黑山再次独立，科索沃可能很快也会独立。 “所以这就是你做的事情，克里斯，”维仍然感到困惑地说，“你必须知道的所有随机东西！”当然，她也知道很多随机的东西，但她还不知道那是随机的。在我这个年龄的人看来，这一切都是令人不安的拼缝。我曾经察觉到的模式已经变得模糊了。有太多的补丁，太多的针脚。这只会变得更糟。

To someone of my age it 's all an unsettling patchwork . Patterns I once perceived have gone blurry . There are too many patches , too many stitches . It will only get worse .

source: His two suitcases , which he left open on the floor , were never entirely unpacked . ( At that time , nothing was unpacked , even in people 's heads . Everything was in storage or in transit . Dreams were kept on luggage racks . ) In one of his suitcases there was a jar of honey from Brittany , a dark fisherman 's sweater , a volume of Baudelaire , and a table-tennis paddle .
domestication: 他扔在地板上的两个行李箱，从来没有完全被打开过。（那时候，什么都没被拆开，甚至连人们的脑袋里也是如此。所有东西都在仓库里或者半路上。梦想就像放在行李架上的行李一样。）在其中一个行李箱里，有一罐来自布列塔尼的蜂蜜，一件深色的渔民毛衣，一本波德莱尔的诗集，还有一块乒乓球拍。
foreignization: 他在地板上打开的两个大旅行箱从未完全被解开包装。（那时，所有东西都没有被解开包装，即使是在人们的脑海里。所有东西都存放在仓库里或者运输途中。梦想被放在行李架上。）在他的一个旅行箱里，有一罐来自布列塔尼的蜂蜜，一件黑色的渔民毛衣，一卷波德莱尔的书籍和一个乒乓球拍。

His two suitcases , which he left open on the floor , were never entirely unpacked . ( At that time , nothing was unpacked , even in people 's heads . Everything was in storage or in transit . Dreams were kept on luggage racks . ) In one of his suitcases there was a jar of honey from Brittany , a dark fisherman 's sweater , a volume of Baudelaire , and a table-tennis paddle .
他扔在地板上的两个行李箱，从来没有完全被打开过。（那时候，什么都没被拆开，甚至连人们的脑袋里也是如此。所有东西都在仓库里或者半路上。梦想就像放在行李架上的行李一样。）在其中一个行李箱里，有一罐来自布列塔尼的蜂蜜，一件深色的渔民毛衣，一本波德莱尔的诗集，还有一块乒乓球拍。

source: The raven feather was many-textured , smooth as silk then fractured anti rough and deep , black to blue from the quill outward . source: That was my world last fall . I fell out of my life like Alice falling through the rabbit hole . Although I had feared mental illness all of my life because my mother wound up with Alzheimer 's disease and my father was severely mentally disturbed after he had a series of strokes , I had no idea that I could lose myself so quickly , so easily .

source: Brahms sat sleeping in the garden . Insects landed briefly on his wrapped-up body , then took off , buzzing , their wings like gauze . The letter lay open on his lap . Thule could see that it was very short , and she thought about how we 're never told enough about the lives of those we love -- that all we ever get is similar to the fly 's teasing weight on our bare skin , the threads of its legs rubbing together , its purpose beyond our imagining . She tried , delicately , to remove the letter without waking Brahms , but the minute she reached out her hand , his eyelids flew open : his eyes were yellow and dangerous .
domestication: 布拉姆斯坐在花园里睡着了，身上裹得严严实实的。有时候会有一两只虫子落在他身上，但马上又飞走了，嗡嗡地叫着，它们的翅膀像纱布一样。信就放在他的腿上，杜尔能看出信写得很短，她不禁想到我们永远无法对所爱的人有足够的了解——我们所能得到的，只是像苍蝇在我们皮肤上的轻触，触须摩擦的感觉，它们的目的完全超出了我们的想象力。她试着轻轻地拿起信，不让布拉姆斯醒过来，但是她刚一伸手，他的眼睑就突然打开了：他的眼睛是黄色的，带着凶险的神情。

source: Alice , smiling , brandished one of her CPI charts . A photographer 's assistant , she spent her days behind the scenes , fetching props , soothing models , fiddling with lights and shadows ; only on the second Tuesday of each month could she emerge with her laser-printed graphs and charts and command everyone 's attention . domestication: 爱丽丝露出了笑容，挥舞着她手里的一张CPI图表。这位摄影师的助手每天都在幕后忙碌，跑腿拿道具，安抚模特，调节灯光和阴影；只在每个月的第二个星期二，她才可以带着激光打印的图表和图纸，吸引所有人的注意力。这并不意味着邦妮会为此感到不满，因为她也常常梦想着从阴影中走出来，步入光明。但是，她有什么资本能做到这一点呢？

source: On the phone in June , one week into summer camp , he tells me he has fallen for the arts and crafts counselor , a Minnesotan with Swedish ancestry , named Anna . The only phone at camp is in the office just off the main dining room . Behind him is the dull roar and clank of a hundred children competing for a limited number of metal serving bowls of macaroni and cheese .
domestication: 六月份，我接到夏令营的电话，刚开学一周，他告诉我他爱上了一个叫安娜的美术老师，安娜是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统。在夏令营里，只有食堂旁边的办公室有电话，他背后是一百个孩子争夺有限的金属盘子里的通心粉和奶酪的声音，乱哄哄的，还伴随着餐具碰撞的叮当声。
foreignization: 六月的一天，夏令营已经进行了一周，他在电话里告诉我，他爱上了一个艺术和手工艺辅导员，这个辅导员是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统，名叫安娜。在营地里，只有办公室旁边的餐厅里有一部电话。他的背后，是一百个孩子为了争夺有限数量的金属通心粉和奶酪餐盒而喧闹和碰撞发出的沉闷轰鸣声。

source: All eyes turned to Sara Montague , the waifish assistant director , who was sitting in the back of the room with her knees up , stitching flowers on a macrame tablecloth . It was Sara 's job to stock the kitchen . Several times in the past , this had brought her into direct engagement with Ginny Stern , often on the losing side . But now her expression was serene . " Mugs ? " Sara asked faintly , as if recalling some benign distant obsession .

source: So it happened that one afternoon in late August a soldier came to sit beside her on the bench . The nighthawks were beginning to stir on their ledges , all at once , like the dark appendages of a huge , reviving organism , its mute intelligence visible in the manifold lights of its eyes . But whether those eyes were lit from within -- the hausfrau rising on tiptoe to set a match to the wick -- or whether it was the effect of the sun going down behind the Monchsberg , spilling its gold across all the windows of Salzburg , Celestine could n't tell .
domestication: 八月下旬的一个下午，一名士兵来到长椅上与塞莱斯汀并肩而坐。这时夜鹰开始在它们的栖息处蠢蠢欲动，突然间，如同一个巨大而复活的生物黑暗的附肢一般，它们的无声智慧通过眼睛的闪烁显现出来。但是，这些眼睛究竟是内发光，还是被落日照亮的结果，塞莱斯汀不禁疑惑，就像一位主妇踮着脚尖点燃蜡烛一样，或者只是夕阳在莫扎特山后缓缓落下，将金色的余晖洒满了萨尔茨堡所有的窗户。
foreignization: 于是，八月下旬的一个下午，有一位士兵来坐在她旁边的长椅上。 夜鹰开始在它们的栖息处蠢动，一齐地，好像巨大、复苏的生物的黑色附肢，它的沉默的智慧在它的眼睛的众多光芒中可见。但是，无论那些眼睛是从内部发出的——女主人在脚尖站起来点燃火柴——或者是太阳落在莫扎特山后面的效果，将金色洒满萨尔茨堡所有的窗户，塞莱斯汀无法辨别。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

So it happened that one afternoon in late August a soldier came to sit beside her on the bench . The nighthawks were beginning to stir on their ledges , all at once , like the dark appendages of a huge , reviving organism , its mute intelligence visible in the manifold lights of its eyes . But whether those eyes were lit from within -- the hausfrau rising on tiptoe to set a match to the wick -- or whether it was the effect of the sun going down behind the Monchsberg , spilling its gold across all the windows of Salzburg , Celestine could n't tell .
八月下旬的一个下午，一名士兵来到长椅上与塞莱斯汀并肩而坐。这时夜鹰开始在它们的栖息处蠢蠢欲动，突然间，如同一个巨大而复活的生物黑暗的附肢一般，它们的无声智慧通过眼睛的闪烁显现出来。但是，这些眼睛究竟是内发光，还是被落日照亮的结果，塞莱斯汀不禁疑惑，就像一位主妇踮着脚尖点燃蜡烛一样，或者只是夕阳在莫扎特山后缓缓落下，将金色的余晖洒满了萨尔茨堡所有的窗户。

So it happened that one afternoon in late August a soldier came to sit beside her on the bench . The nighthawks were beginning to stir on their ledges , all at once , like the dark appendages of a huge , reviving organism , its mute intelligence visible in the manifold lights of its eyes . But whether those eyes were lit from within -- the hausfrau rising on tiptoe to set a match to the wick -- or whether it was the effect of the sun going down behind the Monchsberg , spilling its gold across all the windows of Salzburg , Celestine could n't tell .
于是，八月下旬的一个下午，有一位士兵来坐在她旁边的长椅上。 夜鹰开始在它们的栖息处蠢动，一齐地，好像巨大、复苏的生物的黑色附肢，它的沉默的智慧在它的眼睛的众多光芒中可见。但是，无论那些眼睛是从内部发出的——女主人在脚尖站起来点燃火柴——或者是太阳落在莫扎特山后面的效果，将金色洒满萨尔茨堡所有的窗户，塞莱斯汀无法辨别。

source: In less than a second , a horn will sound from below . Jess will fall back , swing herself away from her father and toward the rest of her life , her friends waiting in a car by the curb , the night to come , the boy who has told her she is beautiful , who will , in a few hours , in the basement of another home , slip his hand inside her pants and whisper again that she is beautiful .

source: " Oh , " she said , and sighed . " I do n't have any idea . I 'll probably just do the same old thing . Live here in the house , and take care of your dad 's books " ( she meant his finances ) , " and try to get by . " She was silent , as if the process of " getting by " was fraught with secret perils . A couple of kids came running along her stretch of beach , laughing and calling out , their flashlights bobbing like will-o-the-wisps . We watched as they ran off toward the spot where the bodies were discovered . The lights dipped and swayed as the kids ran past , growing smaller in the distance .

source: Beth 's mother and the neighbor are not even very good friends . The neighbor was just driving by . She had just come from Beth 's school where she registered her boy for kindergarten for the fall . The neighbor wore a spring suit for the occasion , light green with tiny flowers on it , a skirt and blazer , a white blouse . The boy wore a sailor suit and new red Keds . The mothers drank coffee and the boy ran in and out of the house , showing them the things he had found : a stone , a feather , a leaf , a ladybug .
domestication: 别丝的妈妈和邻居也就一般般熟，不算很好的朋友。邻居那天正好开车经过这里。她刚从别丝的学校回来，刚帮自己的孩子办完今年秋天上幼儿园的手续。为了这事儿，邻居还穿了一身新衣服：春季套装，淡绿色的，上面有小花，连衣裙加夹克，白色衬衫。她的孩子也打扮得整整齐齐，海军风的小西装，新买的红色运动鞋。两个妈妈一边喝着咖啡，一边看着孩子在屋子里跑进跑出，高兴地给她们看自己找到的东西：一块石头、一根羽毛、一片树叶、一只瓢虫。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Beth 's mother and the neighbor are not even very good friends . The neighbor was just driving by . She had just come from Beth 's school where she registered her boy for kindergarten for the fall . The neighbor wore a spring suit for the occasion , light green with tiny flowers on it , a skirt and blazer , a white blouse . The boy wore a sailor suit and new red Keds . The mothers drank coffee and the boy ran in and out of the house , showing them the things he had found : a stone , a feather , a leaf , a ladybug .

别丝的妈妈和邻居也就一般般熟，不算很好的朋友。邻居那天正好开车经过这里。她刚从别丝的学校回来，刚帮自己的孩子办完今年秋天上幼儿园的手续。为了这事儿，邻居还穿了一身新衣服：春季套装，淡绿色的，上面有小花，连衣裙加夹克，白色衬衫。她的孩子也打扮得整整齐齐，海军风的小西装，新买的红色运动鞋。两个妈妈一边喝着咖啡，一边看着孩子在屋子里跑进跑出，高兴地给她们看自己找到的东西：一块石头、一根羽毛、一片树叶、一只瓢虫。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The mothers drank coffee and the boy ran in and out of the house , showing them the things he had found : a stone , a feather , a leaf , a ladybug .

source: Mike 's heart goes out to him . Gautam has the worst case of Squirt Envy anybody in the Brainpan has ever seen , but he also suffers the misfortune of being a rare genius in exactly the right job for both his rarity and his genius . This is a misfortune because Gautam was brought up with a sense of obligation to his fellow human beings , which means that while he wants the Squirt more than anything in the world , he also believes that he owes it to humanity to sacrifice this desire in order to keep the Virt running for everyone else . So . It 's a sad case . But right now Mike needs the optimally functional Gautam , not the despairing Gautam , so he says , " Gautam . Goddammit . What is going on ? "
domestication: 麦克对高谟很有同情心。高谟的嫉妒心十分严重，是大脑海里从未见过的，但同时他也是个奇才，恰好在最合适的职位上发挥着自己的才能。这简直是一种不幸，因为高谟从小就被教育要对人类有责任感，这意味着虽然他非常想要 Squirt ，但他也相信自己欠人类一个牺牲，这个牺牲就是放弃自己的欲望，让 Virt 为所有人服务。唉，真是个可悲的案例。但现在，麦克需要的是状态最佳的高谟，而不是垂头丧气的高谟，所以他说：“高谟，到底怎么了？”
foreignization: 迈克的同情心被触发了。戈塔姆患有大脑中最严重的喷雾嫉妒症，但他也遭遇了不幸，成为了一位罕见的天才，恰好在需要他这种稀缺性和天赋的工作岗位上。这是一种不幸，因为戈塔姆从小被灌输了对人类的责任感，这意味着尽管他比世界上任何东西都想要 Squirt ，但他也相信自己有义务为了让 Virt 能够供所有人使用而牺牲这种欲望。所以，这是一个悲伤的案例。但现在，迈克需要功能最佳的戈塔姆，而不是绝望的戈塔姆，所以他说：“戈塔姆，见鬼了。到底发生了什么？”

source: But the pimp who brought her - Sema or Vova - I do n't remember , kept smiling and stroking the girl . He encouraged us at first with words , then with action . Putting his hand on her neck and simply bending her over , he got Alekhandra all ready . With her backside to us . And without further ado , he lifted up her mini-skirt . There was nothing underneath , or , should we say , there was everything .
domestication: 那个带她来的皮条客，好像叫塞玛或者沃瓦，我已经记不清了，他一直在对我们笑着，并不断抚摸着女孩。开始的时候，他用言语鼓励我们，接着就用行动示范。他把手放在女孩的脖子上，然后直接把她弯腰，瞬间就让亚历山德拉准备就绪，背对着我们。而且毫无顾忌地，他掀起了她的超短裙。在那下面，什么都没有，或者说，什么都有。
foreignization: 但带她过来的人——西玛或者沃娃，我已经记不清楚了——一直在微笑并抚摸着女孩。他一开始用言语鼓励我们，接着又以行动鼓励我们。他把手放在她的脖子上，然后轻松地把她弯腰，于是阿莱汉德拉已经完全准备好了。她背对着我们。而且没有多说什么，他就把她短裙的下摆撩起来了。下面什么都没有，或者说，下面应有尽有。

source: God 's House , thinks Moyshe Rabeynu , that 's where I 'll find real Jews . . . he went up the marble steps , opened a door and saw a beautiful-a magnificent-synagogue . On the platform was a small table , and the rabbi , the president , the shames and a trosti were sitting there playing a noisy , heated game of pinochle . To his question-where could he spend the night ? -first they told him to go the devil , then they had the khutspe to laugh at him and told him to go to Forsayt Strit .
domestication: 摩西拉比心里想：“上帝的家”才是真正的犹太人聚集的地方，肯定能找到一些真心实意的人……于是他走上了大理石台阶，推开门一看，哇，真是壮观！里面有一座漂亮极了的犹太教堂，台子上摆着一张小桌子，拉比、会长、执事和一个管家都坐在那里打着牌，热闹得很。摩西拉比问他们，他夜里能不能住在这里，结果他们先是让他去见鬼，接着还厚着脸皮嘲笑他，让他去福赛特街碰运气。
foreignization: 上帝的家， moyzhe拉比努想，我将在那里找到真正的犹太人...... 他走上大理石楼梯，打开一扇门，看见一座美丽的——壮丽的——犹太教堂。在讲台上有一张小桌子，拉比，总统，犹太教堂管理员和一个托尔斯泰坐在那里正在玩一场吵闹的，激烈的宾果牌游戏。 当他问到哪里可以过夜时，他们首先告诉他去见魔鬼，然后他们敢于嘲笑他，并告诉他去福赛特街。

God 's House , thinks Moyshe Rabeynu , that 's where I 'll find real Jews . . . he went up the marble steps , opened a door and saw a beautiful-a magnificent-synagogue . On the platform was a small table , and the rabbi , the president , the shames and a trosti were sitting there playing a noisy , heated game of pinochle . To his question-where could he spend the night ? -first they told him to go the devil , then they had the khutspe to laugh at him and told him to go to Forsayt Strit .
摩西拉比心里想：“上帝的家”才是真正的犹太人聚集的地方，肯定能找到一些真心实意的人……于是他走上了大理石台阶，推开门一看，哇，真是壮观！里面有一座漂亮极了的犹太教堂，台子上摆着一张小桌子，拉比、会长、执事和一个管家都坐在那里打着牌，热闹得很。摩西拉比问他们，他夜里能不能住在这里，结果他们先是让他去见鬼，接着还厚着脸皮嘲笑他，让他去福赛特街碰运气。

source: Jones went on in this way , gently , his voice free of blame or consternation , but weighted with pleading sadness . Finally , he spread his arms and drew close to Jeffrey . Jeffrey turned and found himself folded into the muscular wingspan . Angela too had somehow become enclosed in it . Jones began a fervent prayer and their three bowed heads touched . " and the sound of wheels on the dining room table . My own shadow -- my fears , hatreds , and ugly little habits all manifested in a rude teenaged boy -- comes flying into the foyer on a skateboard . 就像今晚一样，在穿上睡衣和刷牙之后，我终于把十岁的本杰米赶到他在上铺的床上。当我准备下楼时，我正在决定是倒在沙发上看二月份的Vogue杂志，还是做一个好美国人去看冬季奥运会，这时我听到一个响亮的“Fuck！”和餐厅桌子上轮子的声音。我的影子——我的恐惧、仇恨和丑陋的小习惯都体现在一个粗鲁的青少年男孩身上——骑着滑板车冲进门厅。他穿着宽松的牛仔裤，背心，长袖红色T恤。他很瘦，有着光头和脸上和脖子上的痘痘。“嘘！”我吐着气，匆忙跑下最后几步楼梯。

“ 为什么不行？ ” 布伦特问道。布伦特是个略微肥胖的昆虫学硕士生，总是戴着小熊队的棒球帽，穿着印有啤酒广告的T恤。他已经离婚，有两个孩子，通常会主导他们的对话：我的前妻拿到了我的信用卡。我的前妻长了40斤。我的前妻给我的孩子吃奶酪酱和RC可乐。我的前妻是个荡妇。我的前妻怎样。我的前妻那樣。

source: He tries to remember the last time he saw his wife but cannot. he remembers only the rails of the bed , the steel of them , and the humiliating smell of decay . At some point , she must have given Jess the ring . But why had she done this ? And how had Jess managed to keep this from him ? And why ? Was this a secret between the two of them ? And if so , what was the ring doing on her dresser , left out like a bit of costume jewelry ?
domestication: 他试图回忆自己最后一次见到妻子的情景，但怎么也想不起来。只记得床边的栏杆是金属的，还有腐烂的尴尬气味。一定是在某个时候，她把戒指给了杰斯。但为什么她要这么做呢？杰斯又是怎么瞒着他的呢？为什么呢？这是他们两个之间的秘密吗？如果真是这样，那么戒指为什么会被随意地放在她的梳妆台上，就像一件廉价的首饰一样？他满脑子都是疑问，却没有答案。这个谜团就像一团乱麻，让他越想越糊涂。他觉得自己好像站在一个黑暗的房间里，什么都看不清，也摸不着。
foreignization: 他试图记住自己最后一次看到妻子是什么时候，但记不起来。他只记得床的栏杆、金属的部分，以及腐烂的屈辱气味。在某个时候，她一定已经把戒指给了杰斯。但是她为什么这么做？杰斯又是如何瞒着他的？为什么？这难道是他们两个人之间的秘密？如果是这样的话，那么这枚戒指为什么会像一件服装首饰一样被随意地放在她的梳妆台上？

And if so , what was the ring doing on her dresser , left out like a bit of costume jewelry ?

source: The drummers began to drum and the Possum began to sing , " See my beautiful tail ! " Everyone shouted . This pleased the Possum , so he danced around the circle again and sang , " See what a fine color my tail is ! " Everyone shouted again and the Possum danced around the circle once more . As he danced he sang , " See how my tail sweeps the ground ! "

source: " I also wanted to write about what a spiritual quest might look like at the end of the twentieth century-a spiritual quest by someone who , like so many of my friends , was basically irreligious and resistant to spiritual thought . " Thus was born the story of Alice Black , whose life takes an unexpected turn in the middle of one night . " She 'll spend the rest of the book trying to make sense of what happened that night , " Huneven says . " I 'm not sure she ever does , exactly . But her life is transformed . "
domestication: 我还想写一个故事，讲述在20世纪末，一个人的精神探索之旅可能会是什么样的。这个人，就像我的很多朋友一样，基本上是不信教的，也对灵修思想持抵触情绪。于是，艾丽斯·布莱克的故事诞生了，她的生活在某个夜晚的中间发生了意想不到的转变。休尼文说：“她将在书的剩余部分试图弄清楚那天晚上发生了什么。”“我不确定她是否完全搞清楚了，但她的生活被改变了。”这也许就是艾丽斯·布莱克故事的精髓所在。
foreignization: "我也想写关于20世纪末什么样的精神探索的样子——一个基本上是非宗教和抗拒精神思考的人的精神探索，就像我的很多朋友一样。"于是，爱丽丝·布莱克的故事诞生了，她的生活在半夜时分发生了意想不到的转变。"她将花费余下的时间试图理解那晚发生了什么，”胡尼文说。“我不知道她是否确切地做到了。但她的生活被改变了。”

Translate the following text to Chinese.

" I also wanted to write about what a spiritual quest might look like at the end of the twentieth century-a spiritual quest by someone who , like so many of my friends , was basically irreligious and resistant to spiritual thought . " She 'll spend the rest of the book trying to make sense of what happened that night , " Huneven says . " I 'm not sure she ever does , exactly . But her life is transformed . "

source: She shook her head to dismiss the dark thought and stared at the snowglobe on her side table , on which she set her ever-present cup of hot tea . It did n't matter if the outdoor temperature was twenty-five or ninety-five : " Hot tea , please . That will do . " On this midsummer Saturday in Wanonishaw , Minnesota , even though it was a humid eighty-seven degrees outdoors , Sasha did not turn on the air condi ­ tioning , and still she felt a slight chill .
domestication: 她摇了摇头，想摆脱那阴暗的想法，然后望向床边桌上的雪球形花瓶，她总是把杯子里的热茶放在上面。不管外面的温度是零下二十五度还是三十五度，她的要求永远不变：“来杯热茶就行。”这一天是七月的星期六，在明尼苏达州的瓦诺尼肖镇，虽然外面湿热的气温已经到了摄氏三十七度，萨莎还是没有打开空调，仍然感到有点冷。
foreignization: 她摇了摇头，想要摆脱那黑暗的想法，然后盯着放在她床边桌上的雪球纸weights，茶几上放着她随处可见的热茶杯。不管户外温度是华氏二十五度还是九十五度，她都会说：“热茶，请。这就行了。”在明尼苏达州瓦诺尼肖的这个仲夏星期六，尽管室外潮湿的气温已达到八十七度，萨莎仍然没有打开空调，她还是感到有点寒冷。

" On this midsummer Saturday in Wanonishaw , Minnesota , even though it was a humid eighty-seven degrees outdoors , Sasha did not turn on the air condi ­ tioning , and still she felt a slight chill .

source: When I first met him , I was eleven and he was forty . For the next six or seven years , he was the most influential person in my life . It was with him that I learned to cross frontiers . In French there is the word passeur -- often translated as " ferryman " or " smuggler , " but with the connotation of a guide and something of the mountains . He was my passeur .
domestication: 我还只是个十一岁的孩子时就认识了他，他已经四十岁了。在接下来的六七年里，他是我生命中最有影响力的人。就是跟他在一起，我学会了闯荡世界，突破自我。法语里有一个词，叫做“passeur”，通常翻译成“摆渡人”或者“走私者”，但这个词更有一种向导和山地游侠的意味。他就是我的向导，我的引路人。
foreignization: 当我第一次见到他时，我11岁，他40岁。在接下来的六、七年里，他是我生命中最具影响力的人。正是通过他，我学会了跨越国界。在法语中，有一个词passeur，通常被翻译为“渡船夫”或“走私者”，但它带有向导和山区的内涵。他就是我的passeur。

source: They kept at this until the snow seemed to fall more brightly in one direction , a tracery of faint light in the east as day began . Out of this rode Cobb on his big mare that could plow through drifts where his Buster would valiantly flounder . He said he 'd spent the entire night keeping the herd from being blown away , had n't slept a goddamned wink . To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .
domestication: 他们一直这样坚持着，直到雪似乎在一个方向上飘落得更亮了，东方出现了一丝细微的光芒，新的一天开始了。这时，科布骑着他的大母马从雪中走出来，他的母马可以轻松地在雪堆中前行，而他的另一匹马巴斯特则会在同样的地方努力挣扎。科布说他整个晚上都在努力防止牛群被风吹散，没有睡一分钟。就在他旁边，随着雪花在渐明的光线中飘落，一排长长的马形变得清晰可见，雪覆盖的马匹像一片石头遍布的月球景观一般。
foreignization: 他们坚持这样做，直到雪似乎在一个方向上落下得更亮，这是东方黎明时分的光的一道细纹。 Cobb 骑着他的大母马从中走出来，他的母马可以在牛群将要陷入的雪堆中行进。他说他整个晚上都在防止牛群被吹散，没有睡一分钟的觉。在他旁边，在穿过落雪的光线中显现出来的是一长串弧形的隆起物，像月球上的岩石一样的积雪的马匹。

To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .

Out of this rode Cobb on his big mare that could plow through drifts where his Buster would valiantly flounder . He said he 'd spent the entire night keeping the herd from being blown away , had n't slept a goddamned wink . To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .
他们坚持这样做，直到雪似乎在一个方向上落下得更亮，这是东方黎明时分的光的一道细纹。 Cobb 骑着他的大母马从中走出来，他的母马可以在牛群将要陷入的雪堆中行进。他说他整个晚上都在防止牛群被吹散，没有睡一分钟的觉。在他旁边，在穿过落雪的光线中显现出来的是一长串弧形的隆起物，像月球上的岩石一样的积雪的马匹。

source: Charlie says , " She 's honest . She does n't ice things over . But I fell in love with her on a day I saw her at the cafeteria . She was n't even eating , just reading , with an empty tray next to her . I often seemed to attract women with eating disorders . The kind who shovel in enormous bowls of salad , choose a chocolate layer cake , take a few bites , then pour salt over it so they wont be tempted . Diane was n't like that . I 've always had this feeling she could sustain herself on books and air . "
domestication: 查理说：“她非常诚实，从不对事物粉饰太平。但是我是在学校食堂认识她的，当时我一下子就爱上了她。她当时甚至不是在吃饭，而是在看书，旁边放着一个空盘子。我常常会吸引那些有饮食失调症的女孩，比如那些狼吞虎咽一大碗沙拉，然后点一块巧克力蛋糕，吃几口后又在上面倒上盐，以免自己被诱惑。黛安不是这样的人，我一直觉得她可以靠读书和呼吸来维持生命。”

source: I waited for the one that said Eden Park . No doubt there were others still running then , probably even others that paused at that same island , usually quite abandoned on Saturday mornings , but I knew which one I waited for , knew its noises and smells and the rows of rattan seats where , though I generally had the pick of the place , I always gravitated to the same one at the very back . And I knew the main roads and apartment-lined city streets I still had to put up with , too .
domestication: 我一直在等着那辆写着伊甸园公园的巴士。 当时肯定还有其他巴士正在运行，也许甚至还有其他巴士会在这个通常周六早晨非常荒凉的岛上停靠，但我知道我在等哪一辆，我知道它的声音和气味，以及排列整齐的藤编座位，在那里虽然我可以随便挑选座位，但我总是会被吸引到最后一排的那个座位。 我也清楚我还得忍受那些主干道和城市里排列着高楼大厦的街道。
foreignization: 我等待着写有伊甸园公园的那辆车，毫无疑问还有其他车辆还在运行，也许甚至还有其他车辆会在那个通常在星期六早晨很荒凉的岛上停靠，但我知道我在等哪一辆车，知道它的声音和气味，以及编织袋座位的排列，我虽然一般来说可以任意选择座位，但总是会被吸引到最后排的同一个座位上。而且，我还知道我还要忍受主干道和公寓林立的城市街道。

source: He bypassed a bunch of lobsters and a small pup . He was out about sixty meters now already , but getting into the thick of them . The third one he drilled , he started the hole too low on the ridge and punctured the shell - he could tell when it pushed through without showing on the other side . He knew what was coming and flinched as he jerked the drill back .
domestication: 他闪开一堆龙虾和一只小狗。现在他已经走了大约六十米远，但即将进入热闹的场地。第三个钻孔，他在脊柱上方的位置太低，结果穿透了壳——当它没有从另一侧穿出来时，他就知道发生了什么。他知道接下来会发生什么，于是身体一抖，当他把钻头拉回来时，不禁缩了一下。

source: In all but the stormiest weather , Mr. Bates was either mending his lobster traps or at sea from , as he put it , in to kaint-from can-see to ca n't . Hannah 's workday was longer , starting with building a fire in the cookstove before sunup and not ending until the dishes were dried and the fires banked .
domestication: 拜托斯先生除非遇上大风暴，否则他不是在修补龙虾陷阱，就是从天没亮到天黑的时间都在海上忙碌。与此同时，汉娜的工作日则更为漫长，她得在日出前先生好火，直到晚上洗完碗并熄灭所有的火源才算收工。她的工作实在辛苦！每天除了忙家务还要操持家业，不知累得她怎么受得了！

source: Solomon sat in the corner and drew on his slate , frowning . Hannah , keeping her eye on him , noticed that his markings were not the usual swirls and spirals ; they were jagged lines . He even broke his chalk . She had to give him a fresh one . If she were n't there , would Mr. Bates have noticed ? And how would she ever tell Solomon ? It would be a second death for him .
domestication: 所罗门坐在角落里，在他的石板上画着，皱着眉头。汉娜一直盯着他，注意到他画的不是平常的卷曲和螺旋线，而是一些参差不齐的线条。他甚至把粉笔折断了，她不得不给他一个新的。如果她不在那里，贝茨先生会注意到吗？而且她怎么才能告诉所罗门呢？对他来说，这将是第二次死亡。汉娜心里十分清楚，所罗门已经经历了太多痛苦，再一次打击，他可能就承受不了了。

source: Then Mrs. B. died . A week of constricted breathing , two visits from a doctor who bled her with leeches and dispensed unmarked medications from a black bag , a night of moaning , and then death . Not even a name for the malady . Just age , Hannah concluded . It was bound to come , she reminded herself , but not for a moment had she allowed herself to expect it .
domestication: 后来B夫人去世了。有一周时间，她的呼吸很困难，医生来了两次，为她放血并从黑色的医药袋里拿出没有标签的药给她吃，还有一整夜的呻吟，最后她还是去世了。甚至连病名都没查出来。汉娜想，只能说是岁数大了，她提醒自己，这种事迟早会发生，但即使是一瞬间，她也没想到真的会发生在B夫人身上。
foreignization: 然后，布鲁斯特夫人去世了。在一周的呼吸困难之后，医生两次来访，他用水蛭放她的血，并从一个黑色袋子里拿出没有标签的药物给她，接着是一夜的呻吟，然后就去世了。甚至连病因都没有名字。只是年龄，汉娜得出结论。她提醒自己，这本来就是必然的，但是有一刻，她都没有让自己去期待它。

source: Hannah 's mother agreed to the match by letter , excusing herself from the arrangements because of distance . So even the wedding itself was prepared by Mrs. Crooker . On the day of the wedding , Hannah 's mother and two brothers came to the service in an undertaker 's hired carriage , the cheapest in town . domestication: 韩纳的母亲通过信件同意了这门婚事，理由是距离太远而无法参与到婚礼的准备工作中。因此，即使是婚礼本身也是由克鲁克夫人一手操办的。在结婚那天，韩纳的母亲和两个哥哥乘坐了一辆殡仪馆租来的马车，这是镇上最便宜的交通工具。哥哥们穿着星期日最好的西装，看起来很热很暴躁，就好像他们要去参加葬礼一样。但他们表现得很端庄，几乎让人难以想象在家里他们有多么不修边幅。韩纳的母亲看起来很僵硬，也很防御性，不知为什么，她一直向每个人提起韩纳的父亲曾经是一名律师。

source: As she ate her muffin , she glanced at the syllabus for her first class . " The Love Song of J. Alfred Prufrock " for today . Good , she could teach it with her eyes closed . Like Prufrock , Nan had begun to wear her trousers rolled . That fiftieth milestone coming up would n't be a celebration , though she still " heard the mermaids singing , each to each . " Poor Woody had never known about the mermaids . But he was far from incompetent . What kind of scandal were they concocting in Allabeena County ?
domestication: 她边吃松饼，边瞥了一眼第一节课的教学大纲。今天要教的是《J·阿尔弗雷德·普鲁弗洛克的情歌》。好吧，她可以闭着眼睛就能教这篇文章。就像普鲁弗洛克一样，南开始卷起裤腿。快到五十岁生日了，这并不是值得庆祝的事情，不过她还是能“听到美人鱼们在唱歌，每个人都在跟另一个人唱”。可怜的伍迪从来没听说过美人鱼的事。但他远远谈不上无能。阿拉贝纳县的人到底在搞什么阴谋呢？

source: In bed at night , Lila often thought of the times she 'd broken someone 's heart . She 'd kissed Paul Devaney in high school , but did n't let him go up her dress . She refused to dance with Rahul Kanwar at prom . In college she had given men wrong numbers when they asked her out . She 'd cheated on her boyfriend in veterinary school with a swine professor .
domestication: 夜里躺在床上，莉拉常常会想起那些她曾伤害过的心。高中时，她和保罗·德瓦尼接过吻，但没让他得逞。她拒绝在毕业舞会上与拉胡尔·坎瓦尔共舞。在大学里，她曾经把假电话号码给那些约她出去的男人。在兽医学校里，她还背着男友跟一位猪专家教授偷腥。这些过去的“罪行”在黑夜里像是一根根荆棘，深深地刺痛着她的心。
foreignization: 睡在床上，莉拉经常想到她曾经伤过的心。 她曾在高中亲吻了保罗·德瓦尼，但不让他碰她。她拒绝在舞会上与拉胡尔·坎瓦尔共舞。在大学里，她给那些约她出去的男人错误的电话号码。在兽医学校里，她背着男朋友和一位猪教授搞婚外情。

source: She brought me down and hid me and I lived in her board house near the train tracks . On her dresser she kept the bible , a big pink comb and a leaf of sinka bible . We did n't eat much . I taught her my songs and she showed me tricks I could use in a fight . At night we slept in a bed of rags scented with khus khus , her arm around me like a shield . I called her Vida for she was the first life I knew .
domestication: 她带我到她住的地方，帮我躲藏起来，我就和她一起住在靠近火车轨道的破旧房子里。她的梳妆台上放着圣经，一把大大的粉红色梳子，还有一张圣经的插页。我们吃得很简单，我教她唱我的歌，她教我一些可以用来防身的技巧。到了晚上，我们就睡在一堆有甜香气味的破布堆里，她像一面盾牌一样把我抱在怀里。我叫她维达，因为她是我认识的第一个生命，也是我的新生。
foreignization: 她带我去她家，把我藏起来，我就住在她靠近火车轨道的木板房里。在她梳妆台上，她放着《圣经》、一个大粉色梳子和一张斯卡圣经的一页。我们吃得不多。我教她我的歌，她教我可以在打架时用的诀窍。到了晚上，我们睡在一张用破布铺成的床上，伴随着兴奋剂的香气，她像盾牌一样搂着我的胳膊。我叫她薇达，因为她是我认识的第一个生命。

source: Lurking in the sacred groves and wild places of Gaul were the ancient Druids , who were said to have originated in the primeval forests of Britain across the turbulent waters of the channel . The Druids instructed the young in the secrets of religion , conducted public and private sacrifices , explained the law , and sentenced offenders . When Gallic nobles were ill or in danger in battle , they would resort to human sacrifice with the help of the Druids . Caesar 's armies conquered Gaul , but the power of the Druids with their mysterious gods and rituals was not easily suppressed .
domestication: 在高卢的神圣森林和荒野之地，潜伏着古代的德鲁伊祭司，他们据说起源于不列颠岛的原始森林，隔着波涛汹涌的海峡。这些德鲁伊教士向年轻人传授宗教秘密，主持公私祭祀，解释法律，并惩罚罪犯。当高卢贵族生病或在战场上遇险时，他们会借助德鲁伊教士进行人祭。凯撒的大军征服了高卢，但德鲁伊教士们依靠神秘的神灵和仪式所拥有的力量并不是那么容易被压制的。可以说，德鲁伊教士的影响力根深蒂固，牢牢地扎根于高卢人的心中，难以动摇。正如俗话所说，"斧头砍不断，芝麻仁大小的疑心结"，德鲁伊教士的力量就像这疑心结一样，不容易被完全消除。尽管凯撒的军队取得了胜利，但德鲁伊教士的影响力仍然潜移默化地存在，等待着东山再起的机会。
foreignization: 在高卢的神圣树林和荒野中，古老的德鲁伊教士潜伏着，他们据说起源于英格兰那边狂暴海峡对面的原始森林。德鲁伊教士向年轻人讲授宗教的秘密，进行公开和私人祭祀，解释法律，并判决罪犯。当高卢贵族在战斗中生病或处于危险之中时，他们会在德鲁伊教士的帮助下诉诸人祭。凯撒的军队征服了高卢，但德鲁伊教士凭借他们神秘的神灵和仪式的力量并没有被轻易镇压。

source: " There are several reasons why a technique like AU has to be regulated . Yet , why is it that you can use insurance to cover it ? " Ms. Takayama lowered her voice . " The nation consistently has been behind the spread of AU . The goal was to rein in the falling birthrate . Another factor , however , was this monitoring ability . AU meant that women could produce healthy children for the State . Do you understand ? From the time you are a fetus , you are expected to be loyal . " " I find that odd , " replied Marina .
domestication: 这个AU技术之所以需要受到监管，有几个原因。但是，你不觉得奇怪吗，为什么可以用保险来覆盖它呢？高山女士放低了声音。“国家一直以来都在推广AU，主要目的是为了解决出生率下降的问题。然而，还有一个因素，那就是这种监控能力。AU的意思是女人可以为国家生产健康的孩子。你明白吗？从你还是个胎儿开始，就被期望对国家忠诚。”玛丽娜回答说，“我觉得很奇怪。”
foreignization: “有几个原因说明像AU这样的技术必须受到监管。然而，你为什么可以使用保险来涵盖它？”高山女士降低了她的声音。“这个国家始终在推广AU的后面。目标是控制出生率下降。然而，另一个因素是这种监控能力。AU意味着女性可以为国家生产健康的孩子。你明白吗？从你还是胎儿的时候起，你就被要求忠诚。” “我觉得奇怪，”玛丽娜回答说。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" There are several reasons why a technique like AU has to be regulated . Yet , why is it that you can use insurance to cover it ? " Ms. Takayama lowered her voice . " The nation consistently has been behind the spread of AU . The goal was to rein in the falling birthrate . Another factor , however , was this monitoring ability . AU meant that women could produce healthy children for the State . Do you understand ? From the time you are a fetus , you are expected to be loyal . " " I find that odd , " replied Marina .

source: Marjorie 's husband expressed no interest in meeting Mark , or giving him orders , or even remembering his name . " That student who mows for you " and " the lawn boy " were the infrequent references to Mark that had cropped up in conversations . Gradually Marjorie admitted to herself that she liked it that way .

source: Jeffrey Childs steps out of his slippers , bends over and sets them toe-by-toe beside his nightstand , and sits back into bed with his wife . Beneath the blankets a nebula of warmth radiates from Angela 's body . He loves this pneumatic thrill of her heat as he gets into bed . The smell of her blood-hot limbs . Tonight he has scrubbed his teeth several moments longer than usual . He has stood at the sink in his green cotton pajamas , rinsing his mouth with protracted vigor until the mouthwash tingled and burned , watching himself in the mirror-cheeks pulsing , hands at his hips , eyes beginning to water-then spitting with proud relief , his mouth 's dark interior sanitized , tongue touching teeth as smooth as porcelain .
domestication: 杰弗里从他的拖鞋里滑出来，弯腰把它们整齐地摆在床头柜旁，然后重新躺回床上，和妻子依偎在一起。被子下面，妻子的身体散发着温暖的气息，就像一个星云。他很享受这种每晚钻进被子的感觉，妻子身上的热气让他有一种特殊的快感。他喜欢妻子血液温热的四肢散发出的体香。今天晚上，他刷牙的时间比平常长了一些。他站在洗漱台前，穿着绿色棉睡衣，用力漱口，直到含漱水的味道在嘴里刺激得他耳鸣，眼睛都开始泛泪了——然后，他得意地吐出水来，嘴里的黑暗角落变得干净洁爽，舌头碰到牙齿就像触摸瓷器一样光滑。

source: He stared at the readings . He double-checked the firewalls to make sure none of it leaked over into common memory .

source: I wanted to scream . Scream so fucking loud that time itself would stop . I wanted to run . I wanted to hide . I wanted to hold him in my arms and somehow explain everything I 'd felt out on the rocky shore . About the sailboat and the tides and the dusk and the stars . I wanted to make my words all add up to that glowing moment at the water 's edge , but when the words came all I managed was , " Yes . I know , Aless . I am , too . "
domestication: 我真想大声尖叫，让时间都停下来。 我想跑开，想躲起来，也想紧紧抱着他，把那些在岩石海岸感受到的东西全部告诉他。关于帆船，潮汐，黄昏和星星，我想让我的话语都汇聚成那一刻站在水边的感觉，但当我开口时，只能说出“是的，我知道，亚历斯。我也是。”
foreignization: 我想要尖叫，发出非常响亮的尖叫声，让时间本身停下来。我想要奔跑，我想要躲藏，我想要用双臂抱住他，并以某种方式解释我在岩石海岸上所感受到的一切。关于帆船、潮汐、黄昏和星星，我想让我的话语都汇聚到水边那一刻的光辉中，但当话语脱口而出时，我只说了，“是的，我知道，亚历克斯，我也是。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I wanted to scream . Scream so fucking loud that time itself would stop . I wanted to run . I wanted to hide . I wanted to hold him in my arms and somehow explain everything I 'd felt out on the rocky shore . About the sailboat and the tides and the dusk and the stars . I wanted to make my words all add up to that glowing moment at the water 's edge , but when the words came all I managed was , " Yes . I know , Aless . I am , too . "
我真想大声尖叫，让时间都停下来。 我想跑开，想躲起来，也想紧紧抱着他，把那些在岩石海岸感受到的东西全部告诉他。关于帆船，潮汐，黄昏和星星，我想让我的话语都汇聚成那一刻站在水边的感觉，但当我开口时，只能说出“是的，我知道，亚历斯。我也是。”

source: The contents of her make-up basket have been emptied : lotions , shampoos , toothpaste , all are gone . My things are here now , still housed in my travel bag , except for my clean underwear , waiting next to the bathtub . I soak in the tub until the last of the water is swallowed by the drain . I stay put until the porcelain cools , all the while smelling lavender which rises from my warm skin . I breathe in so much I am no longer able to smell anything . The scent , flowery and feminine , has moved inside of me . It will cling to my body for a while and then gradually slip away , without me knowing .
domestication: 她的化妆篮已经空了：护肤霜、洗发水、牙膏，全都不见了。现在我的东西都在这里，还放在我的旅行袋里，只有干净的内衣放在浴缸旁边等着我。我泡在浴缸里，直到最后一滴水被排水管吸走。我一直坐在那里，直到瓷器变得凉爽，整个过程都能闻到从我温暖皮肤上飘起来的薰衣草香气。我深深地吸入，直到再也闻不到任何味道。那种花香四溢的女性气息已经潜入我的体内，会在我的身上停留一阵子，然后悄悄地消失，我却浑然不知。

source: As children mill about near the cloakroom waiting for the hour of their class , the first hurdle looms : partnering . Who will ask you to walk in with him ? Jack Hutchinson , who bounces in the polka ? Chubby Tuttle , who hops but is a good kid ? Jerry Post , whose hands sweat through his gloves ? Pee Wee Johnson , whose head scrapes your nose ? Or , unasked this week , will you have to find a partner among the other stranded girls , preserve face , and walk in smiling ?
domestication: 孩子们在更衣室外面等待上课的时候，第一个难题就出现了：找舞伴。谁会邀请你和他一起进教室呢？是跳波尔卡舞总是弹跳的杰克·哈钦森？还是虽然跳舞不漂亮但是很好相处的恰比·塔特尔？或者是穿着手套还能让人感觉到他手心出汗的杰瑞·波斯特？又或者是皮威·约翰逊，他的头碰得你鼻子生痛？抑或这周没人邀请你，你不得不在其他落单的女孩中找个伴，保全面子，强颜欢笑地走进去？

source: I sat on a bench talking to my friend Clay , an experienced shooter from a Southern family . Was he packing right then , I asked . To show me , he brushed aside his oversized shirt . There was his pistol , tucked into the waistband of his jeans . Although he often spoke about handguns , I was taken aback . In a moment , what had been just words before became real . Then , I wondered who else at the party was carrying a gun .
domestication: 我和来自南方的一个老朋友克莱坐在长椅上聊天，他是个有经验的枪手。我问他，你现在带枪了吗？他随手拨开宽大的衬衫给我看，原来他的裤子腰带上插着一把手枪。尽管他经常跟我谈论手枪的事，我还是吓了一跳。就在那一瞬间，之前只是口头上的东西变得非常真实。然后，我开始疑惑，_party上还有谁带了枪。
foreignization: 我坐在长椅上，和我的朋友克莱聊天，他是一个来自南方家庭的经验丰富的射手。我问他，他当时是否带枪。为了给我看，他把他那件超大号的衬衫撩开。那里是他的手枪，塞在他的牛仔裤的腰带里。尽管他经常谈论手枪，但我还是被吓了一跳。在那一刻，以前只是言语的东西变成了现实。然后，我想知道派对上还有谁带枪。

source: Oh , I knew those dagoes were coming all right , and that 's why I hid in the orchard , crouching there in Wellington boots , the hem of my dress bunched in one hand . Over sixty trees were in bloom , and I was busy brushing petals out of the valley of fabric between my knees , trying to breathe , because the scent of orange blossom was chokingly sweet . And the rabbits the bloody rabbits had ringbarked all the newly planted almond slips , their buds already wilting .
domestication: 唉，我早就知道那些混蛋会来的，所以我才躲在果园里，蹲在威灵顿靴里，把裙子的下摆握在一只手里。六十多棵树都开花了，我正忙着从膝盖之间的布料中刷掉花瓣，试图呼吸，因为橙花的香气太甜了，令人窒息。还有那些讨厌的兔子，它们把新种植的杏树苗都剥了皮，芽已经开始枯萎了。

source: Above their bed , the tally of squirrels had reached seventeen , yet it seemed to Riley that he had n't made a dent in the squirrel population . They were still running about his land with the same degree of impunity , insinuating their way into the scaffolding of his house , going about their business in a perpetual state of regeneration . The other night , a squirrel had found its way into the bedroom , and in the morning , when Riley and Samantha woke up , the animal looked up imploringly at them , as if he hoped to be invited for breakfast .
domestication: 他们床上方，松鼠的数量已经到了十七只，但莱利觉得好像没能对松鼠数量产生任何影响。这些松鼠还是在他家地盘上四处乱跑，同样肆无忌惮地溜进他房子的脚手架里，继续着它们不知疲倦的繁衍生息。前几天夜里，一只松鼠竟然跑进了卧室，早晨莱利和萨曼莎醒来时，这只小家伙抬头看着他们，好像希望被邀请吃早饭似的。

它占据了每一个表面，有着卷曲的藤蔓和细枝（是叶子？还是头发？），从中又探出一张张令人不安的脸，它们不太像人类，却也不是其他什么东西，就像喷泉里的那个雕像一样。那些脸没有脖子，但有着像爪子一样的小手。火花在它们的眼眸上缓慢闪烁，这些眼睛被岁月和纯粹的空虚磨得像大理石一样光滑。

source: He was a stranger . You were a little girl dressed up and out with your parents and brother for a big evening . He observed the forms of courtesy . It worked . He led you through the dance . You knew what to do . Your steps followed his ; together you moved in time to the music . He returned you to the table , to your family , and left you feeling accomplished , happy , noticed , admired .
domestication: 那时他是个陌生人，而你只是个打扮得漂漂亮亮的小女孩，跟父母和哥哥一起出去享受一个大晚上的时光。他礼貌地邀请你跳舞，这招果然有效。他带着你在舞池中翩翩起舞，你知道该怎么做，你的步伐跟随着他的节奏，两个人一起随着音乐的节拍移动。舞毕，他把你送回餐桌旁，回到你的家庭身边，你感觉自己很成功，很开心，受到关注，也受到了赏识。
foreignization: 他是个陌生人。你当时是个穿着盛装的年轻女孩，与父母和哥哥一起度过一个美好的夜晚。他遵守了礼仪的规范，这样做是有效的。他带领你跳舞，你知道该怎么办。你的脚步跟随他的；你们一起随着音乐移动。他把你送回桌边，回到你的家人身边，并让你感觉到自己很有成就感，快乐，受到了关注，受到钦佩。

source: Baby pine trees had just been planted along one bank and other segments around the pond were roped off so you would n't accidentally walk over seeds trying to grow . Dora took a stick of sugarless gum from her pocket . Chewing , she looked beyond the duck playground , her playground too , and saw the bridge which connected the highway to the toll road that by-passed the city of Chicago . Sometimes groups including Dora went on the other road in a bus to the Museum of Science and Industry , never to Disneyland . Dora was always dimly aware of the sound of big trucks and buses and cars speeding by .
domestication: 一排排小松树刚刚被种植在池塘的一边，而池塘周围的其他区域都用绳子隔开，以免人们不小心踩到正在生长的幼苗。杜拉从口袋里掏出一根无糖口香糖，开始咀嚼着，凝视着鸭子嬉戏的地方，那也是她的游乐场，看到了连接高速公路和绕过芝加哥市的收费公路的大桥。有时，包括杜拉在内的一群人会乘坐巴士走另一条路去科学与工业博物馆，从来没有去过迪斯尼乐园。杜拉总是隐约地感受到大卡车、公共汽车和小汽车疾驰而过的声音。
foreignization: 刚刚在池塘的一侧新种了一些幼苗，池塘周围的其他部分也被隔离起来，这样你就不会不小心踩到正在生长的种子了。多拉从口袋里拿出一根无糖口香糖。嚼着口香糖，她望向鸭子游乐场，那也是她的游乐场，并且看到了连接高速公路和绕过芝加哥市的收费公路的大桥。有时候，包括多拉在内的团体会乘坐公交车走另一条路去科学与工业博物馆，从不去迪斯尼乐园。多拉总是模糊地意识到大卡车、公共汽车和汽车疾驰而过的声音。

source: Celestine felt her fear of him close its hand around the little seed of her heart . He looked so much like one of her father 's clockwork toys that she found herself wondering at what moment , and by what invisible agency , the key had been twisted in the aperture . How carefully her father would lick the tip of his brush into a point , before painting in the pupils on a doll 's eyes ! The soldier 's eyes were terribly bright , and his pupils like the tips of pins .
domestication: 塞莱斯汀感觉到对他的恐惧像是一只手紧握住她心中的小种子。他看起来就像她父亲钟表玩具里的人偶，让她不禁想知道，是什么时候，有什么样的隐形力量，给他上了发条。她父亲会那么小心翼翼地舔尖他的画笔，然后用它在娃娃的眼睛上描绘瞳孔。士兵的眼睛亮得吓人，瞳孔就像大头针的尖端一样。这么一想，她的心情就更加复杂了，好像被某种东西悄悄地操控着一般。

source: He was thin when he came back from Vietnam . No , not really thin , but just not the great stunning lout her loneliness had made of him . The skin on his shoulders , and where it sloped to his breast , was pale , mottled , tight . Almost transparent . He grew a beard . She put her mouth in the beard .. Her mouth against his bearded face . Deep , like a jungle . She liked that , a mouth full of hair . Then his eyes lit up and he took her face in his hands and said , so close their lips were touching , and he smiling all the time , " Wife-to-be . My unwed wife . "
domestication: 他从越南回来时很瘦，不算真正的瘦，只是没有了她在孤独中想象中的那个令人惊艳的大块头。他的肩膀和胸部的皮肤很苍白，斑驳，紧绷，几乎透明。他留起了胡子，她把嘴唇贴在他的胡子上，深深地像是在探索一片丛林。她很喜欢这种感觉，嘴里充满了胡须。然后他的眼睛亮了起来，他握住她的脸，说：“我的准妻子，我的未婚妻。”他的话语温柔，带着笑容，他们的嘴唇几乎相触。

source: My mother , as well as everyone else in town , loved Mr. Garza 's panaderia , and she would send me down to Mr. Garza 's every other day to buy molletes , empanadas , and marranitos . I had to admit that Mr. Garza had great pan dulce : heart-shaped cookies qovered with sugar and cookies shaped like pigs were my favorites .
domestication: 我妈妈和镇上所有人一样，非常喜欢加萨先生的面包店，她每隔一天就派我去那里买些墨西哥式法棍、馅饼还有那些可爱的猪形饼干。我不得不承认，加萨先生的甜面包做得真棒：我最喜欢心形的糖饼和那些猪形饼干，每次都让我高兴不已。

A **28;88;TOOLONG house is already hard to find . " I take a glance at my listing sheet , as if all this crucial data were printed there . I 'm guessing that this brand of coded chalk talk will appeal to **27;118;TOOLONG , and make him think that I 'm not really trying to sell him the Doolittles ' house but am just here to supply reliable , relevant , factual info and to make the world seem less a sinking miasma . Which is not far wrong .
domestication: 简而言之，这就是这么回事，克莱尔。这其中既有来自汉普顿的投资者，也有一些纯粹的投资行为。目前还没有大宗交易发生，竞价战尚未蔓延到这一地区。现在的市场仍然比较单一，但这当然会随着利率的变化而改变。即使利率开始上升，也很难找到一栋像样的房子。我瞥了一眼我的房源清单，仿佛所有这些关键数据都印在上面。我猜测这种暗码式的对话会吸引他的注意，让他觉得我不是在硬塞给他杜立德家那套房子，而是提供可靠、相关、事实性的信息，让这个世界变得不那么糟糕。实际上，这也差不多就是我的目的。
